text.title: Agent Reasoning Depth Budget Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether agent-reasoning-depth-budget applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the agent use extended-thinking / reasoning tokens?

branch.when: yes AND eval shows score plateau

example.description: When `yes` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
